title: AMAS project-local baseline
content: AMAS project-local state is currently anchored to the main branch of drop0ne/amas-spec and represented as v2.0-draft. The doctrine explicitly separates governance core, runtime binding, and conformance profiles, while preserving the four-tier authority model of CANONICAL, OPERATOR, SESSION, and INFERRED.
context_summary: Durable AMAS project-local baseline cell used to test the first non-MPO project-local supercell instantiation.
